title: Oaks Minimap
description: A vanilla  style, light-weight, customiseable minimap designed to not ruin the gameplay feel
body:
### This mod is client side as does work on servers, however, it could be considered cheating my many servers so do check before releasing.


## Description
Want a minimap that doesn't feel out of place? that perfectly fits your vanilla+ modpack or world? Oaks Minimap is designed to do just that. Not only does it display nearby terrian but it keeps it vanilla feeling as possible by renderering the minimap just like a normal map renderes terrrian, it also displays nearby players aswell with a color set by its UUID.

This mod is extremely customisable with its config allowing for players to fit it into their world perfectly. It can also be used on servers as its all rendered client-sided.

## Features
- A fully working vanilla style minimap for that works in any dimensions. including the nether.
- A Client side display of nearby players with UUID support.
- A customisable config menu
